title: Edom's downfall
summary_text: Edom is condemned for pride, betrayal, and gloating over Judah's fall. The LORD announces that the nations will turn on Edom and that escape will fail on the day of his judgment. Zion will be delivered, and the kingdom will belong to the LORD.
key_points: Edom is condemned for pride, betrayal, and gloating over Judah's fall.
The LORD announces that the nations will turn on Edom and that escape will fail on the day of his judgment.
Zion will be delivered, and the kingdom will belong to the LORD.
what the Lord Yahweh says about Edom We.
